slots.name: cta_button
slots.notes: Primary action button e.g. Get Started / Login

slots.name: announcement_bar
slots.notes: Thin banner on top of the navbar, used for promos/notices

layout_variants.name: Floating Capsule Bar
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Pill-shaped navigation bar floating at the top center of the page (w-auto max-w-lg mt-4). Uses a dark, translucent glassmorphic backdrop (backdrop-blur-md bg-slate-950/70 rounded-full) with a thin reflective border (border border-white/10). The capsule contains only the logo on the left (in [Heading Font]) and a smooth hamburger trigger button on the right (in [UI Font]), removing secondary links to establish an ultra-minimalist, modern feel. Entrance Load: Step 1: Initialize fully hidden (opacity: 0, y: -40px, scale: 0.9). Step 2: On load, slide down smoothly and scale up to 1.0 over 400ms using spring physics. Scroll Behavior: Pinned at the top and scales down slightly on scroll down. On scroll up: Slides down into view automatically (smart show-on-scroll-up).

layout_variants.name: Fullscreen Typography Menu
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Clicking the menu trigger opens a fullscreen overlay panel (dark backdrop or vibrant neon color). Main links are displayed in giant, bold [Heading Font] (text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black uppercase tracking-tight) stacked vertically at the center. Screen corners show social links, contact email, and copyright notice in fine [UI Font]. Entrance Load: When clicked open, links perform a staggered split-text reveal from below through a hidden clip-path over 500ms, while the close (X) button rotates 90 degrees. Hover Interaction: Hovered link slides a solid color background sweep behind the text, while other link rows fade to 70% opacity to highlight focus.

layout_variants.name: Sliding Drawer Panel
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: A drawer navigation panel sliding in from the right edge of the screen on click (occupying 30-40% viewport width). Styled in dark translucent glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-950/80 border-l border-white/10). Vertical link list features stylized prefix glyphs like `[-] HOME`, `[o] ABOUT`, `[x] WORK` in sharp [Heading Font] or [UI Font]. Entrance Load: Drawer panel slides horizontally from right to left (x: 100% -> 0%) using spring physics. Links slide up and fade in sequentially from top to bottom with an 80ms stagger.

layout_variants.name: Segmented Floating Navbar
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: A floating glassmorphic navbar split into 3 distinct segments separated by diagonal cuts (segmented glass panels). The center segment hosts the logo in [Heading Font], the left segment contains the Menu trigger, and the right segment holds quick actions in [UI Font]. Entrance Load: All 3 segments slide down together from the top edge of the screen. Hover Interaction: The hovered segment glows along its borders and runs a metallic sweep overlay along the diagonal seams.

layout_variants.name: Minimal Header Trigger
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Ultra-minimal header bar situated along the top edge of the screen. Features only a monochrome logo in [Heading Font] on the left and a small MENU trigger button in [UI Font] on the right. Beside the MENU button, a neon green dot pulses slowly (breathing neon dot) acting as a visual anchor on a dark backdrop. Entrance Load: Logo and trigger button slide down from the top edge over 300ms. Hover Interaction: The neon dot pulses faster on hover while the MENU button shifts 3px via spring physics for tactile feedback.

entrance.intent: The navigation bar slides in smoothly from the top edge (y: -80px -> 0px) while fading in (opacity: 0 -> 1). Note: If the page has an active Intro Loader / Page Transition, this entry is delayed and triggers only after the intro ends (delay: 1.2s to 1.5s depending on the intro variant), maintaining a clean, cohesive initial load.

sticky.intent: When scroll progress crosses 80px, the navbar toggles to a sticky state: Step 1: Background shifts from transparent to 90% opacity. Step 2: Activates a 12px backdrop-blur. Step 3: Adds a thin bottom border and subtle shadow. Scrolling back to the top restores the original transparent header state.

link_hover.intent: Navigation link hover effect: Step 1: Text color transitions to primary brand color over 150ms. Step 2: A 2px underline sweeps smoothly from left to right. Step 3: Text rises by 2px along the Y-axis. Hover exit: Reverses the entire transition, hiding the underline.

cta_hover.intent: Primary CTA button hover interaction: Step 1: Button expands by 1.05x using spring physics. Step 2: Triggers a shimmer sweep across the button face from left to right. Step 3: Box-shadow glow extends by 10px. Hover exit: Restores static state over 150ms.

mobile_menu.intent: Mobile menu overlay interaction: Step 1: A backdrop overlay covers the page, fading to 40% opacity. Step 2: Menu drawer slides out from the right (x: 100% -> 0%) with an 8px backdrop blur. On close: Drawer slides back right and backdrop fades out.

in.notes: Navbar is the first element, no transition in is needed.

out.description: Navbar overlaps the Hero section — Hero content starts below the navbar (padding-top equal to navbar height).
